name: Usman
observedShift: They have not passed probation but doing very well

focusPoints.label: Where they want to stretch their facilitation skills
focusPoints.reason: As a Lead Scrum Master in a Growth & career plan meeting, identifying specific areas for skill development is crucial for career progression.
